data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Home Depot Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings Report
data.description: Home Depot (NYSE: HD) to report Q2 earnings on Aug. 13. Analysts expect $4.50/share, down from $4.65/share last year. Dividend yield at 2.59%.

data.title: Nasdaq Introduces Stricter Delisting Rules For Penny Stocks
data.description: Nasdaq will suspend companies from trading on its exchanges if their share price has been below $1 on the completion of 360 trading days.

data.title: OpenAI Fears 'Users Might Form Social Relationships' With AI Due To ChatGPT's Human-Like Voice Mode
data.description: OpenAI has expressed concerns about the potential emotional reliance of users on its new ChatGPT voice mode, which closely mimics human speech patterns.
